_comment: Reference set of capability strings that an issuer can sign into a credential. Hashes are keccak256 of the human-readable name and are loaded by the CLI/MCP for verification.

capabilities.label: KYC verified (basic)
capabilities.description: Subject has completed basic KYC with the issuer.

capabilities.label: Authorized to trade on retail CEX venues
capabilities.description: Subject is permitted to execute trades on retail centralized exchanges.

capabilities.label: Accredited investor (RWA-eligible)
capabilities.description: Subject is an accredited investor and may hold RWA tokens.

capabilities.label: Authorized to engage in escrow-backed commerce
capabilities.description: Subject may participate as buyer or seller in escrow contracts (Aegis, Pact, x402).

capabilities.label: Authorized to execute token swaps
capabilities.description: Subject may execute token swaps through approved routers.

capabilities.label: Authorized to bridge tokens cross-chain
capabilities.description: Subject may bridge tokens through approved bridge protocols.
